notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 17 CVEs: CVE-2022-50341, CVE-2022-50367, CVE-2023-53401, CVE-2023-53331, CVE-2023-53386, and 12 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
